name: Asus VG34VQL3A (VA Panel, Res: 3440X1440, 180Hz, 1ms GTG, Curved )
highlights: TUF Gaming VG34VQL3A 34″ Ultrawide Gaming Monitor delivers an immersive 1500R curved VA panel with stunning WQHD (3440×1440) resolution, 180Hz refresh rate, and 1ms response time
Designed for serious gamers and content creators, it supports HDR10, AMD FreeSync Premium Pro, and features DisplayHDR 400 certification
With Adaptive-Sync, DisplayWidget Center, and dual 2W speakers, this monitor offers top-tier performance and next-level visuals, all packed in a sleek, ergonomic design
